sub-flow.name: shopifyOrders-get-subflow
sub-flow.doc:name: Query Shopify Order by Store Front - Sub

logger.doc:name: Log Start
logger.message: #['[FLOW_START] shopifyOrders-get-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | region=' ++ (vars.region default 'UNKNOWN')]

logger.doc:name: Log End
logger.message: #['[FLOW_END] shopifyOrders-get-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | ordersCount=' ++ (sizeOf(payload.data.orders.edges default []) as String)]

logger.doc:name: Log Error
logger.message: #['[ERROR] shopifyOrders-get-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | errorType=' ++ (error.errorType as String default 'UNKNOWN') ++ ' | errorDescription=' ++ (error.description default '') ++ ' | flowName=shopifyOrders-get-subflow | rootCause=' ++ (error.cause.message default 'none')]

logger.doc:name: Log Start
logger.message: #['[FLOW_START] shopifyProductInventory-get-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | region=' ++ (vars.region default 'UNKNOWN')]

logger.doc:name: Log End
logger.message: #['[FLOW_END] shopifyProductInventory-get-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | productsCount=' ++ (sizeOf(payload default []) as String)]

logger.doc:name: Log Error
logger.message: #['[ERROR] shopifyProductInventory-get-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | errorType=' ++ (error.errorType as String default 'UNKNOWN') ++ ' | errorDescription=' ++ (error.description default '') ++ ' | flowName=shopifyProductInventory-get-subflow | rootCause=' ++ (error.cause.message default 'none')]

logger.doc:name: Log Start
logger.message: #['[FLOW_START] shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | region=' ++ (vars.region default 'UNKNOWN')]

#['[ERROR] shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | errorType=VALIDATION:MISSING_PARAMETERS | errorDescription=Missing required parameters: region or query | flowName=shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | rootCause=region or shopifyQuery variable is null']

raise-error.description: Region and at least one query parameter are required

logger.message: #['Parameters validation passed | correlationId=' ++ correlationId]
#['Routing to USA Shopify GraphQL endpoint | correlationId=' ++ correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Before USA HTTP Request
logger.message: #['[BEFORE_HTTP_REQUEST] Calling Shopify USA GraphQL endpoint | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | region=USA']

logger.doc:name: Log After USA HTTP Response
logger.message: #['[AFTER_HTTP_RESPONSE] Received response from Shopify USA GraphQL endpoint | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | region=USA']
#['Routing to CAN Shopify GraphQL endpoint | correlationId=' ++ correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Before CAN HTTP Request
logger.message: #['[BEFORE_HTTP_REQUEST] Calling Shopify CAN GraphQL endpoint | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | region=CAN']

logger.doc:name: Log After CAN HTTP Response
logger.message: #['[AFTER_HTTP_RESPONSE] Received response from Shopify CAN GraphQL endpoint | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | region=CAN']

#['[ERROR] shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | errorType=CONNECTIVITY:UNSUPPORTED_REGION | errorDescription=Unsupported region for GraphQL endpoint | flowName=shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | region=' ++ (vars.region default 'UNKNOWN') ++ ' | rootCause=Region not supported for Shopify GraphQL endpoint']

raise-error.description: Region not supported for Shopify GraphQL endpoint

logger.message: #['[ERROR] shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | errorType=CONNECTIVITY:GRAPHQL_ERROR | errorDescription=GraphQL query returned errors | flowName=shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | rootCause=' ++ (write(payload.errors, 'application/json') default 'none')]
#['GraphQL query executed successfully | correlationId=' ++ correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log End
logger.message: #['[FLOW_END] shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Error
logger.message: #['[ERROR] shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | correlationId=' ++ correlationId ++ ' | errorType=' ++ (error.errorType as String default 'UNKNOWN') ++ ' | errorDescription=' ++ (error.description default '') ++ ' | flowName=shopifyGraphQL-post-subflow | rootCause=' ++ (error.cause.message default 'none')]
